original_prompt: Create a Python project in the current directory that will be used as a template for starting new projects, and provides best practices and documentation on how to add new features. Include examples and POCs for the following: [API, CLI tool, CRUD, WebSocket, SSE, RESTFUL client/server], utilizing best practices and libraries as needed. Each iteration should do one thing, log it in log.md, and add any tasks that still need to be done in tasks.md.
